CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Set For Trial On Jun-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DANIELLE CROCKETT, ESQ., 415.765.9500, FOR PLAINTIFF GESTAMP ASETYM SOLAR NORTH AMERICA, INC.
MICHAEL MCCOLLUM, ESQ., 213.972.4500, FOR DEFENDANTS GCL SOLAR SOLUTIONS, INC. AND GCL SOLAR ENERGY, INC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs GCL SOLAR SOLUTIONS, INC. & GCL SOLAR ENERGY, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege each of the four causes of action. Whether the exculpatory provision (Terms and Conditions, 19) applies is a question of fact that is not proper subject of a demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR#7489.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DANIELLE CROCKETT, ESQ., 415.765.9500, FOR PLAINTIFF GESTAMP ASETYM SOLAR NORTH AMERICA, INC.
MICHAEL MCCOLLUM, ESQ., 213.972.4500, FOR DEFENDANTS GCL SOLAR SOLUTIONS, INC. AND GCL SOLAR ENERGY, INC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs GCL SOLAR SOLUTIONS, INC. & GCL SOLAR ENERGY, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Denied. Whether the exculpatory provision (Terms and Conditions, 19) applies to limit the damages sought is a question of fact that is not proper subject of a motion to strike. The pleadings are not irrelevant, false or improper. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR#7489.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Jul-31-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS GCL SOLAR SOLUTIONS, INC. & GCL SOLAR ENERGY, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to July 31, 2013, to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the reply with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by July 10, 2013. The court has the moving and opposing papers. Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Jul-31-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTs GCL SOLAR SOLUTIONS, INC. & GCL SOLAR ENERGY, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
is continued to July 31, 2013, to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the reply with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by July 10, 2013. The Court has the moving and opposing papers. Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF KIP A. SMITH, ESQ. FOR ADMISSION AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR PLAINTIFF GESTAMP ASETYM SOLAR NORTH AMERICA, INC. is Granted. The Court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
